title: I’m More Than a Bit Worried About the Typhoon That’s About to Hit a Group of U.S. Islands
description: Though the islands have scandal-ridden pasts, climate change doesn’t distinguish between exploited workers and crooked government officials.
content: Its been a long time since the U.S. Commonwealth of the Northern Marianas Islands was up in the news. The last time I recall is back in the days of Jack Abramoff and Speaker Tom DeLaylook them up, ki… [+2996 chars]
de: Ich mache mir mehr als ein bisschen Sorgen wegen des Taifuns, der eine Gruppe von US-Inseln treffen wird. Obwohl die Inseln eine von Skandalen geprägte Vergangenheit haben, macht der Klimawandel keinen Unterschied zwischen ausgebeuteten Arbeitern und korrupten Regierungsbeamten.
en: I’m More Than a Bit Worried About the Typhoon That’s About to Hit a Group of U.S. Islands. Though the islands have scandal-ridden pasts, climate change doesn’t distinguish between exploited workers and crooked government officials.
la: Plus quam amet sollicitus sum de Typhoon That's about to Hit a Group of U.S. Islands. Etsi insulae praeteritos scandalos habent, mutatio climatis non distinguit inter opifices maleficos et tortuosos magistratus.
